title: Shareholder 1099 Information
summary: Both the January 2019 and the Elders Benefit checks are NON-TAXABLE. This means that: Class A & C Shareholders will not receive a 1099. A 1099 MISC will only be mailed and uploaded to the portal on 1/31/2020 if you won a prize such as the early bird or Stock Will Extravaganza, or if you received a d...
